title: Service Charges
body_text:
Service Charges
1	Introduction
1.1	Overview
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, identifies product and service pricing for Central 1âs Technology and Payment Services Department. This form is available to Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario only.
All fees are collected monthly and charged to your current account with Central unless otherwise noted.
Canadian dollar charges are posted to your Canadian dollar current account at Central 1 at month-end.
US dollar charges are posted to your US dollar current account at Central 1 at month-end. If you do not have a US dollar current account with Central 1, the charges are converted to Canadian dollars and posted to your Canadian dollar current account.
